name: Meersburger Kirschen-Dessert (Cherry Desert M
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese to room temperature.
2. Grind almonds in a blender if ground almonds are not available.
3. Wash and drain cherries, removing stones. Reserve 8 whole cherries for garnish.
4. Place cherries in a bowl; add kirsch.
5. In a small pan, boil sugar and water for about one minute to make a thin sugar syrup.
6. Add the sugar syrup to the cherries; stir until well blended.
7. Cover and let soak for 20 minutes.
8. Cut ladyfingers in half and divide into four portions. Place in individual glass dishes.
9. Arrange cherries on top of the ladyfingers.
10. Thoroughly blend cream cheese, sugar, vanilla extract, and ground almonds.
11. Whip the heavy cream and carefully fold it into the cream-cheese mixture.
12. Spoon over the cherries.
13. Garnish with chopped pistachio nuts and whole cherries.
